title: sauropus albicans var. genuinus
intro: Sauropus albicans var. genuinus, also known as the "Sariva" or "White variety," is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Sauropus albicans var. genuinus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
